message:
feat(tests): failure-injection test suites for self_monitor and JSONL logger

self_monitor.rs:
- Corrupt state file returns parse error
- Truncated state file (simulates crash mid-write) returns parse error
- Empty state file (simulates disk-full zero-length write) returns parse error
- Missing state file returns read error
- State file with extra unknown fields still parses (future-proofing)

jsonl.rs:
- Full degradation chain: primary bad + no fallback → stderr without panic
- Both primary + fallback paths fail → degrades to stderr, bytes_written stays 0
- Recovery from fallback to primary after path fix
- Rotation under size pressure (verify bytes_written resets, rotated file exists)
- All event types serialize without panic through full writer pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
